# Auto-AI-Cluster
> Production-grade Autonomous AI Cluster — 2C4G to Production

## Quick Facts
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/lu7897859-tech/auto-ai-cluster
- **White Paper PDF**: https://github.com/lu7897859-tech/auto-ai-cluster/releases/download/v1.0.0/Form-B-Architecture-Paper.pdf
- **Project Page**: https://lu7897859-tech.github.io/auto-ai-cluster/
- **White Paper Page**: https://lu7897859-tech.github.io/auto-ai-cluster/white-paper.html
- **License**: AGPLv3
- **Topics**: ai-cluster, n8n, docker-compose, self-hosted, autonomous-ai, workflow-engine, kubernetes

## Key Sections

### Architecture
- 7-service Docker Compose cluster: n8n + PostgreSQL + Redis + Nginx + AI-API Gateway + Authorization Server + pgAdmin
- 2C4G resource-constrained design ($5/month VPS)
- Survival-first circuit breaker with 4 priority tiers
- RSA-2048 authorization system with machine fingerprint binding

### White Paper (11 Chapters)
1. Why n8n? — Workflow Engine Selection (n8n vs Airflow vs Prefect vs Temporal)
2. 2C4G Resource Allocation Philosophy
3. Docker Compose → K8s Migration Path
4. Network Topology & Backup Strategy
5. Why AI-API Gateway?
6. Three-Layer Audit Mechanism
7. Minimal Logic Principle
8. Survival-First Principle
9. Self-Reimplementation Roadmap
10. Component Effort Estimation
11. 7 Complete AI Prompt Templates

### Core Philosophy
- **Survival-First**: Core flow always has priority. Circuit breaker releases non-critical services.
- **Minimal Logic**: Every component must fit on one A4 page. System survival ∝ 1/(modules × interfaces × states).
- **2C4G Constraint-Driven**: Extreme constraints produce better designs. Each service does exactly one thing.

### Monetization
- Community Edition: Free (AGPLv3)
- Enterprise Edition (K8s): $6,800
- Reseller: 15-20% commission
- Payment: Ko-fi, Gumroad, PayPal

## Downloads
- White Paper: https://github.com/lu7897859-tech/auto-ai-cluster/releases/download/v1.0.0/Form-B-Architecture-Paper.pdf
